mapper.select: select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phone_no, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
